statement: On Val5, PTBCC improves accuracy by 15 percentage points over the best reported baseline.
domain: The exact cleaned Val5 corpus: 100 tasks, 38 workers, 5 classes, 1000 labels, and 100 truths.
metric: fractional credit across tied maximum scores, as in the BWA/FGBCC reference utility
verified_if: The faithful full-data methods reproduce the reported baseline ordering and PTBCC-minus-best-baseline rounds to 0.15.
falsified_if: Author-released code and exact data under the stated setup contradict the quantified gain.
otherwise: BLOCKED; reconstruction disagreement alone is not elevated to falsification.
